questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Howard Carter and Lord Carnarvon were the first people to enter the tomb of Tutankhamun.
questions.reason: Reason (R): The excavation work was led by Lord Carnarvon, and Howard Carter discovered the entrance to the tomb.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Carter and Carnarvon made the discovery together, making both statements true and the reason a correct explanation for the assertion.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The tomb of Tutankhamun was discovered in 1912.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
